caribbean.headline: Heavy Rainfall Impacts Martinique with Calm Winds
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing heavy rainfall with a 100% chance of rain, while winds remain light at 11 knots and wave heights stay low around 2.3 feet from a southeast swell direction. Conditions in Cozumel show similarly light winds near 13 knots, indicating generally calm marine weather across the Caribbean despite widespread precipitation.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Rain Impact Mykonos Maritime Operations
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing sustained winds up to 25 kt with wave heights reaching 6.9 ft and a dominant northwest swell period of 8 seconds. Rain probability is elevated at 68 percent, potentially affecting port activities while Marseille reports lighter winds at 16 kt with less marine impact.
